description: Transform the quarterly sales data from wide format to long format. Restructure the 5 product categories and 4 quarters into Category-Quarter-Sales rows for charting and analysis.

natural_language.prompt: Transform the quarterly sales data from wide format to long format. The current data has categories in rows and quarters (Q1-Q4) as columns. Create a new structure with three columns: Category, Quarter, and Sales, where each category-quarter combination is a separate row.
